title: poa tovarii
intro: Poa tovarii, a species of grass within the family Poaceae, is a type of plant native to South America. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Poa tovarii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations have been traditionally used by indigenous communities in the region.
